examples: Professor Jennings, I hope I am not interrupting, but you wanted to see me?
In sign language, I repeated what Ms. Jennings had said in case my parents hadn't read her lips.
Oh, that Ken Jennings, always quick with a quip.
Pinch hitter Justin Turner delivered a run-scoring double off Dan Jennings in the eighth.
Mr Snowden and Mr Jennings face 22 charges between them, all of which they deny.
